Book Launch:
Book Launch Goals
Bonus
You need to know your goals…
• Just like we started in PLF, you need to know
what your goal is…
• If you don’t know where you’re going, any road
will take you there…
• Why are you writing a book? What do you want to
accomplish?
• The answer will drive your launch strategy
BONUS - BOOK LAUNCH
My goals…
• These were my primary goals for my book:
• Additional positioning and authority
• A new lead source
• Legacy
• Impact
• NOTE: Making money was NOT on my list
BONUS - BOOK LAUNCH
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

My launch goals…
• My goals for the book led me towards a launch
goal of:
• Making the NY Times bestseller list
• Hopefully more than one week on the list
• Make money for my partners
• Have the process be profitable overall
• All of these were based on me having some really
strong assets
BONUS - BOOK LAUNCH
What are your goals?
• You always wanted to write a book?
• Money?
• Positioning?
• Bestselling author?
BONUS - BOOK LAUNCH
What are your goals?
• Lead generation?
• Legacy?
• Help people?
• Just get your art out into the world?
BONUS - BOOK LAUNCH
